data.description: BOOKING HOLDINGS EXEC: ESTIMATES THE CONFLICT'S IMPACT ON MARCH ROOM NIGHT GROWTH AT ROUGHLY 6 PERCENTAGE POINTS, WITH ABOUT HALF STEMMING FROM REDUCED BOOKINGS AND THE OTHER HALF FROM HEIGHTENED CANCELLATIONS.

BOOKING HOLDINGS EXEC: BUSINESS WAS HIT BY THE ONGOING MIDDLE EAST SITUATION, WHICH DROVE ELEVATED CANCELLATIONS AND A SLOWDOWN IN FRESH BOOKINGS IN MARCH, WITH RIPPLE EFFECTS EXTENDING BEYOND THE REGION — INCLUDING SHIFTS IN BROADER TRAVEL PATTERNS, NOTABLY ALONG TRANSIT CORRIDORS LIKE EUROPE-ASIA.
STARBUCKS CEO NICCOL: WE HAVEN'T OBSERVED MACROECONOMIC EFFECTS FILTERING DOWN INTO CONSUMER BEHAVIOR — CONFERENCE CALL.

data.title: ENEL CHILE ANNOUNCES THE FILING OF THE 2025 ANNUAL REPORT ON FORM 20-F
data.description: Enel Chile, a utility company operating in electricity generation, disclosed the submission of its 2025 annual report on Form 20-F to the United States Securities and Exchange Commission on April 28, 2026. Traded under the ticker symbol ENIC on the NYSE, the company based in Santiago, Chile, is a key player in the energy sector. This annual report filing provides crucial insights into Enel Chile's financial performance and operational activities from the previous year, offering transparency to investors and stakeholders.

data.title: HelloNation Outlines How Humidity Affects Hardwood Floors, Featuring Hardwood Flooring Expert Jay Branham
data.description: A recent report discusses the impact of moisture levels on the performance of floors and provides recommendations for homeowners to preserve long-term durability. Specifically, in West Columbia, S.C. as of April 28, 2026, the article explores how humidity affects the condition of hardwood floors within residential properties. By addressing this issue, individuals can ensure the lasting quality of their floors.

data.title: Orbia Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Mexico City - Orbia Advance Corporation, S.A.B. de C.V. shared unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2026, showcasing solid performance. The Company, trading as BMV: ORBIA*, reported revenues reaching $1.96 billion with an EBITDA of $259 million during this period. A comparison to Q1 2025 reveals an 8% revenue growth, driven by increased sales in all business segments, and a notable 31% rise in EBITDA. The positive financial highlights underline Orbia's continuous progress in the market.

data.title: Civeo Corporation Amends Credit Agreement, Increasing Capacity and Extending Maturity to 2030
data.description: Houston, TX - Civeo Corporation (NYSE:CVEO) disclosed a recent update on its credit agreement, relating to the Company’s revolving credit facilities. The amendment covers an extension of the credit agreement's maturity date until April 2030, as opposed to the previous deadline of August 2028. Additionally, the total capacity of the revolving credit facility has been raised to $285 million, an increase from the initial amount of $265 million. Bradley J. Dodson, Civeo’s P, expressed that this amendment plays a crucial role in fortifying the Company’s financial resilience and liquidity position.

data.title: OFF GRID UNVEILS A NEW STANDARD IN TRACKSIDE HOSPITALITY AT THE MIAMI GRAND PRIX 2026
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Off Grid Hospitality introduced a new and exclusive experience through their latest venture, offering a unique opportunity to immerse oneself in luxury and tranquility. For further details and high-quality images, visit their website at https://www.offgridrace.com/. Access photo and video credits to Off Grid Hospitality for media purposes.

data.title: Leading CDMO Selects Kneat to Power Digital Validation Transformation
data.description: A major Contract Development and Manufacturing Organization (CDMO) in Europe has chosen Kneat to drive their digital validation transformation. This partnership will initially focus on enhancing their equipment validation procedures.

data.title: Wine Expert Jonathan Bovard of Escanaba Offer Wine Tasting Tips for HelloNation
data.description: In Escanaba, Michigan, on April 28, 2026, a recent HelloNation article explores the distinctive aspects of wine tasting in Michigan's Upper Peninsula compared to traditional wine regions. This guide offers practical advice for visitors seeking to enjoy wine like a local in the area. The article discusses unique features and characteristics of wine tasting experiences in Michigan's Upper Peninsula, highlighting key differences from more traditional wine regions.

data.title: Select Medical Holdings Corporation Announces Expiration of Hart-Scott-Rodino Waiting Period
data.description: Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania - On April 28, 2026, Select Medical Holdings Corporation, known as Select Medical, disclosed that the waiting period regulated by the Hart-Scott-Rodino Antitrust Improvements Act of 1976, for the proposed transaction has ended. The company is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol SEM. While specifics of the transaction were not provided in the announcement, this step signifies progress in the deal.

data.title: Vista Gold Announces Voting Results from Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: In Denver, Vista Gold Corp. (NYSE American and TSX: VGZ) revealed the outcome of its recent annual general and special shareholder meeting on April 28, 2026. A significant percentage of the total common shares, specifically 80,429,324 shares representing 55.49%, were present at the meeting. The detailed results of the ballot votes, especially for the election of directors, were disclosed.

data.description: The Management Board of AS Silvano Fashion Group, a company with registry code 10175491 and address at Tulika 17, 10613 Tallinn, is suggesting to the shareholders to approve resolutions without holding a meeting as per § 299 1 of the Commercial Code.

data.title: Laserfiche Introduces AI Agents: The Future of Intelligent Content Management
data.description: Las Vegas - Laserfiche recently introduced AI Agents designed to streamline intricate workflows using natural language, ensuring secure, compliant, and intelligent content management.

data.title: Cornerstone Bancorp, Inc Quarterly Report - March 31, 2026
data.description: In Palatine, Illinois, as of April 28, 2026, Cornerstone Bancorp, Inc. released its first quarter 2026 financial highlights for the period ending on March 31, 2026. The consolidated net income for the quarter was reported at $2.4 million, translating to $2.48 per diluted share. This is an increase compared to the first quarter of 2025, where the net income was $2.0 million, or $2.06 per share.

data.title: NCR Atleos Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results
data.description: Atlanta-based NCR Atleos Corporation (NYSE: NATL) is set to announce its first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, after the market closes. In light of the ongoing transaction with The Brinks Company, they have decided not to conduct an earnings conference call or provide a financial forecast. Atleos, a prominent player in self-service financial solutions, specializes in ATM services and holds a leading position in the industry.
